name: io.github.citronlegacy/deepghs-mcp
title: DeepGHS MCP
description: MCP server for the DeepGHS anime AI ecosystem. Browse 8M+ image datasets (Danbooru2024, Sankaku, Gelbooru, Zerochan), search tags across 18 platforms, find pre-built LoRA character datasets, and generate complete waifuc data pipeline scripts for Stable Diffusion training.

environmentVariables.name: HF_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: HuggingFace API token. Optional for public datasets but recommended to avoid rate limiting. Required for gated/private repositories. Get yours at https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens
